query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as "count!"
        FROM tasks t
        JOIN task_assignees ta ON ta.task_id = t.id
        WHERE ta.user_id = $1
          AND t.due_date < $2
          AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
              SELECT 1 FROM board_columns bc
              WHERE bc.id = t.column_id
              AND (bc.status_mapping->>'done')::boolean = true
          )
